mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, email, password_hash, display_name, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id,username,password_hash,status FROM users WHERE username=#{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT id,username,password_hash,status FROM users WHERE email=#{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT id,username,password_hash,status FROM users WHERE id=#{id} LIMIT 1
